scripts.install: npm install && cd ./backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.test: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run test --prefix frontend" "npm run test --prefix backend"
scripts.test:coverage: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run test:coverage --prefix frontend" "npm run test:coverage --prefix backend"
